title: Schedule Event Schema
description: Validates a real-time event emitted due to a change or execution milestone in a scheduled job.

event_id.description: Unique identifier for this event instance.

event_type.description: The type of state transition or action happening to the schedule.

schedule_id.description: The ID of the affected ScheduleRecord.

owner.description: The owning provider of the schedule.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the event occurred.

payload.description: Contextual details associated with the event (e.g., run_id, error message, or configuration diff).
